segments.label: Git branch
segments.description: Current Git branch; omitted when unavailable.

segments.label: Project name
segments.description: Detected project name; omitted when unavailable.

segments.label: Model + reasoning
segments.description: Current model name with reasoning level.

segments.label: Context remaining
segments.description: Percentage of the context window remaining; omitted when unknown.

segments.label: Run state
segments.description: Compact session state such as Ready, Working, or Thinking.

segments.label: Current directory
segments.description: Current working directory.

segments.label: Model
segments.description: Current model name without reasoning level.

segments.label: Reasoning
segments.description: Current reasoning level.

segments.label: Pull request
segments.description: Open pull request number for the current branch; omitted when unavailable.

segments.label: Branch changes
segments.description: Committed branch changes relative to the default branch; omitted when unavailable.

segments.label: Permissions
segments.description: Active permission profile or sandbox summary.

segments.label: Approval mode
segments.description: Active command approval mode.

segments.label: Context used
segments.description: Percentage of the context window used; omitted when unknown.

segments.label: 5-hour limit
segments.description: Remaining primary usage limit; omitted when unavailable.

segments.label: Weekly limit
segments.description: Remaining secondary usage limit; omitted when unavailable.

segments.label: Codex version
segments.description: Codex application version.

segments.label: Context window size
segments.description: Total context window size in tokens; omitted when unknown.

segments.label: Used tokens
segments.description: Total tokens used in the current session; omitted when zero.

segments.label: Input tokens
segments.description: Total input tokens used in the current session.

segments.label: Output tokens
segments.description: Total output tokens used in the current session.

segments.label: Thread ID
segments.description: Current thread identifier; omitted until the thread starts.

segments.label: Fast mode
segments.description: Whether Fast mode is active.

segments.label: Raw output
segments.description: Whether raw scrollback mode is active.

segments.label: Thread title
segments.description: Current thread title, or thread identifier when unnamed.

segments.label: Workspace headline
segments.description: Enterprise workspace notification headline; omitted when unavailable.

segments.label: Task progress
segments.description: Latest update_plan checklist progress; omitted until available.

segments.label: Use theme colors
segments.description: Apply colors from the active Codex theme.
